title: HOME REPAIR PROGRAM - 211info
text: KLAMATH AND LAKE COUNTIES COUNCIL ON AGING HOME REPAIR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps with minor home repairs and modifications focusing on health and safety, like ramps and heating system repairs. 404 Main Street Suite 6 Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, other eligibility requirements may apply Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 205-5400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 205-5400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GATEKEEPER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
